samples.raw: {"sentences":[{"text":"The same failure pattern was observed in two recent sessions.", "factIds":["F2"]}, {"text":"The pattern repeated without variation in the workflow execution.", "factIds":["F2", "F7"]}, {"text":"The recurrence was consistent across both Problem and What happened fields.", "factIds":["F2", "F8"]}, {"text":"This indicates a systemic issue in the workflow automation logic.", "factIds":["F2", "F10"]}], "whyItMatters":"Repeating the same idea in Problem and What happened makes the focused card less useful.", "expectedBehavior":"Recurring workflow friction should be summarized without exposing raw evidence by default."}

{"sentences":[{"text":"Validation attempts failed twice in a single stale-shell pattern.","factIds":["F2","F7"]},{"text":"The stale-shell pattern was associated with two failed validation attempts in local evidence.","factIds":["F10","F11"]},{"text":"The pattern's recurrence suggests a systemic issue with local validation state.","factIds":["F2","F8"]},{"text":"Fresh project shells should be used to avoid repeated validation friction.","factIds":["F4"]}]}

{"whyItMatters":"Repeated validation friction undermines trust in the validation results due to inconsistent state across local shells.","expectedBehavior":"Validation should run from a fresh project shell after changes to ensure consistent and reliable outcomes."}

{"sentences":[{"text":"A local build check failed in a nearby validation loop.", "factIds":["F2"]}], "whyItMatters":"A release package would be hard to trust without a clean build.", "expectedBehavior":"Build validation should pass before release packaging."}
